children.label: A
children.text: the education of children with disabilities; and
provide short-term training programs and institutes.

children.heading: Prohibition against Federal mandates, direction, or control
children.label: b Prohibition against Federal mandates, direction, or control
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to authorize an officer or employee of the Federal Government to mandate, direct, or control a State, local educational agency, or school’s specific instructional content, academic achievement standards and assessments, curriculum, or program of instruction.

children.heading: Confidentiality
children.label: c Confidentiality
children.text: The Secretary shall take appropriate action, in accordance with , to ensure the protection of the confidentiality of any personally identifiable data, information, and records collected or maintained by the Secretary and by State educational agencies and local educational agencies pursuant to this subchapter.section 1232g of this title

children.heading: Personnel
children.label: d Personnel
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to hire qualified personnel necessary to carry out the Secretary’s duties under subsection (a), under , and under part D of subchapter IV, without regard to the provisions of title 5 relating to appointments in the competitive service and without regard to chapter 51 and subchapter III of chapter 53 of such title relating to classification and general schedule pay rates, except that no more than 20 such personnel shall be employed at any time.section 1418 of this title

a model form of the prior written notice described in subsections (b)(3) and (c)(1) of that is consistent with the requirements of this subchapter and is sufficient to meet such requirements.section 1415 of this title
